Grants 65–130 Physical Defense and Magical Defense, and restores 0.6% {hp} every 5s. Teammates within a range of 800 gain 50% of this effect.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Reward</color>
Max Health +400–800 
Main Attack Stat +25–50
<color=#4f6f95>(1 main attack stat = 1 Physical Attack or 2 Magical Attack)</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Guerrilla</color>
Every 3s, grants 6 EXP, and grants 6 Gold to the teammate with the lowest amount of Gold.

<color=#4f6f95>Wielder does not take a share of the earnings from monster and minion kills, but instead gains a separate 25%-50% Gold and EXP (maxes out at the 20:00 mark).

If lane minions die and their Gold is not collected, 50% of the Gold will drop on the ground. Up to 600 Gold can be picked up.</color>
<color=#4f6f95>Can quickly switch between Guardian roaming equipment at no cost ({cd} 300s).</color>

<color=#ffffff>Active - Rescue</color>
Grants a shield that negates (240–480 + <color=#3cb088>10%{hp}</color>) damage to teammates within range for 4s.
({cd}: 60s)
<color=#4f6f95>Roaming equipment active skill cooldown is shared by the team.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Agility Aura</color>

Increases Main Attack Stat by 25–50
<color=#4f6f95>(1 main attack stat = 1 Physical Attack or 2 Magical Attack)</color>

<color=#4f6f95>Can quickly switch between Crimson Shadow roaming equipment at no cost ({cd} 300s).</color>

<color=#ffffff>Active - Mirror Domain</color>
Releases a scouting light wave that deals damage 4 times to enemies within a range of 1,200, each dealing damage equal to 3% of current Health and slowing them by 25%–50%. The scouting light remains within range for 2s, providing visibility and exposing stealth units, while also dealing damage and slowing enemies.
({cd}: 75s. If no targets are hit, 75% of the {cd} will be restored.)

<color=#FF6150>Requires Smite to purchase. Reduces damage from monsters by 25% and grants 20% more EXP from monsters.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Hunter</color>
When a Basic Attack or a skill hits a monster, it takes <color=#f264ff>70–140</color> <color=#f264ff>magical damage</color> every 0.5s for 2s (ranged attacks only deal 50% damage).

<color=#4f6f95>
Before 04:00: Grants 50% Gold and EXP from minions and monsters rather than the normal amount distributed to the team.
Before 10:00: Deals 25% less damage to minions.</color>
<color=#FF6150>Requires Smite to purchase. Reduces damage from monsters by 25% and grants 30% more EXP and 20% more Gold from monsters.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Hunter</color>
When a Basic Attack or a skill hits a monster, it takes 70–140 + (<color=#3cb088>0.45% of the target's {hp}</color>) magical damage every 0.5s for 2s (ranged attacks deal 50% of this damage, and heroes only take 10% damage).

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Reward</color>
Increases Magical Attack by 6 when you or a teammate within a range of 700 units kills a monster, for up to 15 stacks.

<color=#4f6f95>
Before 04:00: Grants 50% Gold and EXP from minions and monsters rather than the normal amount distributed to the team.
Before 10:00: Deals 25% less damage to minions.</color>
<color=#FF6150>Requires Smite to purchase. Reduces damage from monsters by 25% and grants 30% more EXP and 20% more Gold from monsters.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Hunter</color>
When a Basic Attack or a skill hits a monster, it takes 70–140 + (<color=#3cb088>0.45% of the target's {hp}</color>) physical damage every 0.5s for 2s (ranged attacks deal 50% of this damage, and heroes only take 10% damage).

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Reward</color>
Increases Physical Attack by 3 when you or a teammate within a range of 700 units kills a monster, for up to 15 stacks.

<color=#4f6f95>
Before 04:00: Grants 50% Gold and EXP from minions and monsters rather than the normal amount distributed to the team.
Before 10:00: Deals 25% less damage to minions.</color>

list.equipNarrativeDesc: <color=#4f6f95>The old man clad in a fox pelt hammered the dragon scale over the scorching furnace over and over again. At last, in the burning flames, the blade was reborn.</color>

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Devastating Blow</color>
Basic Attacks and skills deal physical damage equal to <color=#3cb088>7% {hp}</color> to minions and monsters, and restore Health equal to 50% of the damage dealt (halved for ranged attacks).
({cd}: 2s)

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Divine Power</color>
Basic Attacks and skills deal physical damage equal to <color=#3cb088>3.5% {hp}</color> to enemy heroes and towers (half for ranged attacks).
({cd}: 2s)
